generate, pipeline, RNA-seq..."] TASK_TYPE -->|diagnosis| TT_DIAG["DIAGNOSIS
error, fail, debug..."] TASK_TYPE -->|data| TT_DATA["DATA

health, vllm, restart..."] TASK_TYPE -->|general| TT_GEN["GENERAL
other queries"] end TT_WF & TT_DIAG & TT_DATA & TT_JOB & TT_EDU & TT_SYS & TT_GEN --> DETECT subgraph DETECTION["2️⃣ Tool Detection"] DETECT["tools.detect_tool(query)"] DETECT --> TOOL_FOUND{"Tool
Detected?"} TOOL_FOUND -->|Yes| SPECIFIC["Specific Tool
e.g., GENERATE_WORKFLOW"] TOOL_FOUND -->|No| GENERAL_HANDLER["General Handler
Route by TaskType"] end SPECIFIC --> PERM_CHECK GENERAL_HANDLER --> DEFAULT_TOOL["Select Default Tool
for TaskType"] DEFAULT_TOOL --> PERM_CHECK subgraph PERMISSION["3️⃣ Permission Check"] PERM_CHECK["check_tool_permission(tool)"] PERM_CHECK --> PERM_MAP["Map Tool → Permission
read/write/execute/delete"] PERM_MAP --> LEVEL_CHECK{"Allowed at
Current Level?"} LEVEL_CHECK -->|Denied| PERM_DENIED["❌ Permission Denied
Return Error Response"] LEVEL_CHECK -->|Needs Approval| APPROVAL["🔔 Request Approval
NEEDS_APPROVAL response"] LEVEL_CHECK -->|Allowed| EXTRACT end PERM_DENIED --> RESPONSE APPROVAL --> RESPONSE subgraph EXECUTION["4️⃣ Tool Execution"] EXTRACT["_extract_parameters(query, tool)"] EXTRACT --> EXEC["execute_tool(tool, **params)"] EXEC --> AUDIT_LOG["📝 AuditLogger
log_tool_call()"] AUDIT_LOG --> TOOL_HANDLER["Tool Handler
Actual Implementation"] TOOL_HANDLER --> RESULT["ToolResult
success/error + data"] RESULT --> AUDIT_RESULT["📝 AuditLogger
log_tool_result()"] end AUDIT_RESULT --> BUILD subgraph RESPONSE_BUILD["5️⃣ Response Building"] BUILD["_build_response()"] BUILD --> COMBINE["Combine:
• Messages
• Data
• Suggestions"] COMBINE --> AGENT_RESP["AgentResponse
